headline: Palantir AI floor confirmation. Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as a Program of Record — official core military system mandated for integration across all armed forces branches by September 2026 per Steve Feinberg memo (March 2026). Contract ceiling now nearly $1.3B through 2029. Oversight transfers from NGA to DOW Chief Digital and AI Office; US Army takes future contracting actions. Institutional deepening documented but composite cannot move below floor. Resolves pending 2026-04-27 proposal.
key_evidence: March 2026: Pentagon designated Palantir's Maven Smart System as a Program of Record. Feinberg memo dated March 9 2026.
Mandate: integration across all armed forces branches by September 2026 (close of FY).
Maven Smart System fuses disparate military systems and intelligence sources into one interface, compressing the military's processes for finding and striking targets.
Contract ceiling raised to nearly $1.3B through 2029 (Pentagon disclosure).
Oversight transfers from NGA to DOW Chief Digital and AI Office within 30 days; US Army takes responsibility for future contracting.
MSS deployed in live-fire exercises and active in real-world conflicts by multiple combatant commands.
Palantir confirmed among 7-firm Pentagon classified AI deployment cohort (corroborates institutional deepening across the sector).
No positive humanitarian reorientation signals found in window.

evidence.finding: Pentagon to designate Palantir Maven AI as Program of Record — multi-year stable funding, integration across service branches, streamlined procurement.
DOD components face 'aggressive' timeline for Maven Smart System transition; September 2026 integration target across all branches.
Project Maven Program of Record designation; oversight transfer to DOW CDAO; Palantir as primary supplier.

scoring_rationale.BND: 1 unchanged (floor). Maven Program of Record mandate across all armed services branches deepens institutional commitment to targeting infrastructure without independent harm-evaluation. B3 Scope Clarity floor sustained.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 1 unchanged (floor). S4 Structural Critique floor sustained: Karp manifesto endorses lethal use of products against perceived adversaries.

negativeSignals: Maven Program of Record mandate is institutional deepening across all service branches; $1.3B ceiling through 2029; live-fire exercise deployment; real-world conflict use confirmed; no third-party red-teaming or independent harm evaluation.
sector_context: Palantir's Program of Record designation parallels broader Pentagon classified AI deployment cohort (Microsoft, AWS, Nvidia, Reflection AI, others). Palantir's distinctive role: targeting-and-strike infrastructure rather than general-purpose AI. Floor-cluster posture differs from DeepMind/Google (employee resistance present) and Anthropic (Pentagon-cohort exclusion).
open_actions_resolved: Pending 2026-04-27 proposal resolved with this assessment
Maven Program of Record designation scored as institutional-deepening evidence under BND/SYS — floor sustained
Karp manifesto held as background governance evidence
open_actions_carried: Floor exit criteria: independent harm evaluation, third-party red-teaming, customer-list disclosure, harm-metric publication — none in trajectory
